# Cloud Waste Scanner Community v2.9.23

v2.9.23 is a content and release-governance update for the private release line.  
This release consolidates recent website/blog operations changes and fixes release process gaps without changing desktop binary metadata.

## What changed

### Blog and site content operations

- Updated newest blog spotlight target to:
  - `A 30-Day Cloud Waste Turnaround: What Actually Worked`
- Corrected blog index metadata alignment:
  - `Last updated` and `Newest post` now reference the same newest article.
- Corrected blog series placement:
  - Moved the 30-day turnaround article into Incident/Story context.
  - Removed this article from Release Notes series context.
- Corrected Release Notes series ordering to chronological sequence for forward growth.
- Reconciled blog series card counts and per-series totals for consistency.

### Release process hardening

- Added `v2.9.23` release note as a first-class tracked release artifact.
- Enforced release notes gating in CI:
  - tagged release now requires `.github/release-notes/<tag>.md`
  - missing release note file blocks release workflow.
- Configured GitHub release body generation from tag-matched release note file.
- Clarified that this release is non-binary and keeps desktop app metadata unchanged.

## Compatibility

- App metadata version: unchanged from previous binary build.
- Scope: website/blog content operations + release governance.

## Delivery notes

- This release identifier is intended for private release tracking continuity when no new desktop binaries are produced.
- Future release tags continue from this sequence while preserving binary/content separation rules.
